div1.entryFree: Clean, adv., quite, entirely: c. starved for a look, Sonn. 75, 10. roaming c. through the bounds of Asia, Err. I, 1, 134. disfigured c. R2 III, 1, 10. though not c. past your youth, H4B I, 2, 110. domestic broils c. overblown, R3 II, 4, 61. renouncing c. the faith they have in tennis, H8 I, 3, 29. this is c. kam, Cor. III, 1, 304. c. consumed, Tit. I, 129. c. from the purpose, Caes. I, 3, 35. wash this blood c. from my hand, Mcb. II, 2, 61. it is c. out of the way, Oth. I, 3, 366. ere c. it o'erthrow nature, Cymb. III, 6, 20.
